top_signals.title: Warsh’s New Challenge: Containing Fed Hawks as Inflation Simmers - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Warsh’s New Challenge: Containing Fed Hawks as Inflation Simmers  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Credit Agricole Sells $670 Million Samurai Bonds on Wider Spread
top_signals.summary: Credit Agricole SA set terms for ¥106.5 billion ($670 million) of samurai bonds, offering wider spreads than comparable domestic corporate debt amid rising benchmark yen rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: New Zealand Firms Slightly Less Gloomy as Costs Remain Elevated
top_signals.summary: New Zealand business sentiment recovered slightly in May, but remains near three-year lows as surging fuel prices slow economic growth, damping customer demand and eroding profits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Crypto trading firm FalconX confidentially files with SEC for IPO, hires bankers
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Samsung's shares surge as much as 6% company ships next-generation AI memory chip samples
top_signals.summary: Shares of Samsung Electronics surged after the company has started to ship HBM4E chip samples to its customers globally.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Taiyo Yuden sees ‘scary’ levels of AI parts demand risking supply chain
top_signals.summary: The Tokyo-based company and Murata Manufacturing comprise the bulk of the world's supplies of high-end multilayer ceramic capacitors needed for artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Key US inflation measure posts largest annual increase in three years - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Key US inflation measure posts largest annual increase in three years  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Lawson opens small supermarket in Tokyo
top_signals.summary: The supermarket, named L Minimart, aims to attract budget-conscious consumers amid rising prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Canadian man gets 33 years for using social media to coerce US children into sending sexual content
top_signals.summary: Prosecutors said the man spent years using fake online identities to contact children and manipulate them into sending sexually explicit images and videos.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Treasury rolls out Trump Accounts app nationwide - Reuters
top_signals.summary: US Treasury rolls out Trump Accounts app nationwide  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Metals Company’s seabed exploration license application passes regulatory milestone
top_signals.summary: The USA B application area covers ~122,000 km2 of seafloor and hosts an estimated 1.02 billion tonnes of polymetallic nodules.
